findings: Collab summary counts JSONL files with wc -l and returns 0 when files are missing; malformed or partial JSON lines will still be counted, so summaries can look healthy even when ledgers are corrupt.
Commander nested telemetry parsing lacks visible error handling around json.load; malformed or partial swarm-state.json causes telemetry omission rather than an explicit warning.
Orphan recovery treats exceptions reading commander swarm-state.json as inactive, so malformed telemetry can contribute to claimed-task requeue behavior.
